final:
module RefModule(
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] A_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] B_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Bit" *)
  input S_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  output[7:0] Y_o
wire __Y_o_tmp = S_i ? B_i : A_i;
assign Y_o = __Y_o_tmp;

endmodule
